issue.title: Fix SDK eval breadcrumbs showing Auto Evals
issue.body: SDK eval breadcrumbs show Auto Evals instead of the user-defined evaluation name. Steps to reproduce: run an SDK evaluation and open the UI trace. Expected behavior: breadcrumb displays eval name. Suggested fix: pass eval metadata through the SDK response and add regression coverage.

repository.description: LLM application evaluation and agent tooling

reasons: Direct AI/eval/tooling issue with clear reproduction.

issue.title: agent_context_builder.py should respect MEMORY_DIR environment variable
issue.body: The agent_context_builder.py script ignores MEMORY_DIR and writes memory files to the default path. Steps to reproduce: set MEMORY_DIR, run the agent context builder, observe output path. Expected behavior: memory directory follows the environment variable. Suggested fix: read env var in the builder and add a test.

reasons: Low-influence but strong profile fallback candidate.

issue.title: Add GitLab MCP tool integration
issue.body: Implement a GitLab MCP integration for the SDK. Add the MCP tool wrapper, map GitLab API responses into tool outputs, and cover the integration with validation tests. Expected behavior: agent workflows can call the GitLab MCP tool and receive structured results.

repository.description: LLM evaluation platform with SDK integrations for AI agent workflows

reasons: MCP integration is a direct AI agent-tooling task and should not be capped as profile mismatch.

issue.title: [feat] Log parent package when erroring during dependency install
issue.body: When uv fails during dependency install, the error does not show the parent package that introduced the dependency. Expected behavior: CLI logs the parent package chain. Suggested fix: include parent package context in resolver errors and add CLI snapshot tests.

repository.description: Fast Python package manager and CLI

reasons: Python package-manager issue is useful elsewhere but lacks AI, LLM, agent, prompt, eval, or model evidence.

issue.title: How to run multiple images with multiple masks respectively
issue.body: I checked the test file and it can only run on one image and mask. I tried a loop and got a TensorFlow graph reuse error in model.build_server_graph.

comments.body: Oh thank you, I have found the answer: set reuse=tf.AUTO_REUSE.

reasons: Answered how-to support question should not rank as an AI agent task.

issue.title: (aws-glue-alpha): struct schema produces unsupported inputStrings
issue.body: Schema.struct generates invalid inputStrings for nested Glue structs. Steps to reproduce: build nested struct schema and query with Athena. Suggested fix: update TypeScript schema rendering.

repository.description: Cloud development kit for infrastructure as code

reasons: TypeScript infrastructure issue should not be front-page material for AI agent tooling.

issue.title: Default table editable behaviour broken when dataframe has index
issue.body: A Taipy GUI table with a pandas dataframe index fails when editable is enabled. Steps to reproduce: create a dataframe, set index, render tgb.table editable, then add or delete rows. Expected behavior: table editing works.

repository.description: Python app framework for data and AI applications

reasons: Repo-level AI topic is not enough when the issue itself is a generic GUI table bug.

issue.title: Add Reset Password Functionality to Workspace UI
issue.body: Add reset password functionality in the workspace UI. Add a reset password element next to each user, show a confirmation dialog, call the password reset API, and show success or error feedback.

repository.description: LLM application evaluation and agent tooling

reasons: AI repo context should not make a generic account-management UI issue rank for agent tooling.

issue.title: --pretty=all piped to a pager does not work on Windows
issue.body: HTTPie color output piped to less or more on Windows does not show colors. Debug output includes regular HTTP headers such as User-Agent. Expected behavior: pretty colored output survives paging.

reasons: HTTP User-Agent text must not satisfy the AI agent profile.

issue.title: 10 bộ hướng dẫn về AI Agents cho người mới
issue.body: Add ten beginner learning resources about AI agents to the resource list.

reasons: Learning-resource content addition is not an agent tooling coding task.

issue.title: AdvancedProfiler ValueError stopping action that was never started
issue.body: AdvancedProfiler raises ValueError when stopping an action that was never started. Expected behavior: profiler handles missing action safely. Suggested fix: guard stop calls and add tests.

reasons: AI-adjacent Python testing issue, but not agent-specific.

issue.title: add the post-render option to the helm deploy
issue.body: Helm deploy does not expose the post-render option. Expected behavior: skaffold config accepts post-render and passes it to helm. Suggested fix: update deploy schema and integration tests.

reasons: Infrastructure issue should not outrank AI/agent tool issues.

issue.title: How to run multiple images with multiple masks respectively
issue.body: Question about running multiple images with multiple masks. The expected command and failure mode are unclear.
